page_metadata.biotools__summary: Reproducible Epigenomics Analysis pipeline for the analysis of ChIP-Seq and RNA-Seq data using Docker images containing Galaxy and Jupyter. The analysis workflow was originally designed to analyze Brassica rapa data.
